name: Grilled Dried Beef (Thit Bo Kho)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Lean bottom round or sirloin, cut into one piece, about 6 inches in diameter
2 Stalks fresh lemon grass, or 2 tablespoons dried lemon grass
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chiles and sugar in a mortar and pestle and pound to a fine paste.
2. Add the chopped lemon grass, fish sauce, and soy sauce and stir to blend (or blend all ingredients together).
3. Spread the paste over the beef pieces to coat both sides. Let marinate for 30 minutes.
4. Spread out each slice of marinated beef on a large, flat wire rack or baking sheet.
5. Let stand in the sun until both sides are completely dried, about 12 hours (or place a rack on a jelly roll pan and let the beef dry in the refrigerator for 2 days).
6. Grill the beef over a medium charcoal fire or transfer the rack to the middle of a preheated 400°F oven and bake until brown and crisp, about 10 minutes.
7. Serve with glutinous rice.
NOTE: After cooking, the meat may be kept for up to 1 week in a covered jar at room temperature. Makes 4 servings.
